id: authorization-organization-role-permissions-controller-set-permissions
title: "Set permissions for a custom role"

api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Set permissions for a custom role"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/authorization/organizations/{organizationId}/roles/{slug}/permissions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Replace all permissions on a custom role with the provided list.
